modules.title: Welcome to the training library
modules.shortDescription: How this self-study area works alongside your cases and competency milestones.

modules.title: Volume 1: Diagnostic Trichology and Pattern Hair Loss Medicine
modules.shortDescription: Foundational diagnostic and pattern hair loss medicine reference for early training.

modules.title: Volume 2: Diffuse Shedding, Immune-Mediated Hair Loss, Cicatricial Alopecia and Scalp Disease
modules.shortDescription: Advanced medical causes and scalp disease patterns relevant to safe case planning.

modules.title: Volume 3: Foundations of Clinical Trichology
modules.shortDescription: Core clinical trichology principles for practical trainee decision-making.

modules.title: Volume 4: Therapeutics, Regenerative Medicine and Foundations of Hair Restoration Surgery
modules.shortDescription: Therapeutics and regenerative principles linked to surgical restoration fundamentals.

modules.title: Volume 5: Advanced Surgical Integration, Professional Practice, Research Literacy and Certification
modules.shortDescription: Advanced integration and professional standards for higher-level trainee progression.
